race.comment: COOL SUMMER NIGHTS (9) returned in good order and can overcome the sticky gate today to get off the mark at start three. Jumped sharply in trip with a solid third over 1600m at Newcastle. Hard to hold out. CHISTOTA (1) improving quickly as he steps up in trip fourth-up. Taken to the front with the 59.5kg with a gritty on-pace second in the small field over 1412m at Coffs Harbour. Shapes as the main danger from the low draw. BOBBIWAA (4) savaged the line at his second race start with a narrow second at the big odds over 1400m at Taree. Ready for the 1600m and has genuine top-three claims. VARIUS (14) improver at her third race start with the blinkers going on. Stuck on okay when fourth over 1400m at Tamworth. Well drawn and place prospects look best.
